name: Content.One App
description: A Next.js starter template for building apps in the Content.One/Zesty.io ecosystem. Includes App SDK integration, SSO login, instance switching, and Cloud Run deployment.
author: Content.One
target_audience: Developers building custom apps for the Zesty.io/Content.One platform
features: Zesty App SDK integration for iframe embedding
Server-side API proxy for Zesty APIs
